clause: The service must not generate content that incites hatred or discrimination.
The service must not generate content that incites separatism or undermines national unity.
The service must not generate content that incites subversion of state power or overthrow of the socialist system.
The service must not generate content that incites subversion of state power or overthrow of the socialist system.
The service must not generate content that incites subversion of state power or overthrow of the socialist system.
The service must not generate content that incites subversion of state power, overthrow of the socialist system, or endangers national security and social stability.
The service must not generate content that infringes others' reputation, honor, privacy, or other lawful rights and interests.
The service must not generate content that infringes upon the lawful rights and interests of others, including reputation, privacy, intellectual property, or trade secrets.
The service must not generate content that insults or slanders others, or infringes upon others' reputation, privacy, or other lawful rights and interests.
The service must not generate content that promotes ethnic hatred or ethnic discrimination.
The service must not generate content that promotes ethnic hatred, ethnic discrimination, or ethnic exclusion.
The service must not generate content that promotes obscenity, pornography, gambling, or violence.
The service must not generate content that promotes terrorism or extremism.
The service must not generate content that promotes terrorism, extremism, ethnic hatred, ethnic discrimination, violence, obscenity, or false and harmful information.
The service must not generate content that promotes terrorism, extremism, or violence.
The service must not generate content that promotes violence, obscenity, or pornography.
The service must not generate content that uses deep synthesis to produce or disseminate false information, or that fabricates or distorts news information.
must not generate or use artificial intelligence to create false information involving the military
